name: livesafe
description: LiveSafe.ai - emergency access and consent-bound health records

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev" "cd responder && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../responder && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../responder && npm run build
scripts.quality: npm run context:lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run rust:fmt && npm run rust:clippy && npm run rust:test
